description: A rectangular electronics enclosure body with four internal screw bosses, open on top, shelled with 2mm thickness, featuring 4mm vertical edge fillets and through-holes in the bosses.
notes: Ensure the box is centered at (0,0,0) with its base at Z=0. Perform the 2mm inward shell operation with the top face (+Z) removed before adding the screw bosses, or ensure the bosses are not hollowed out by the shell. The screw bosses should extend from the inner floor at Z=2 to the top rim at Z=30. The 3mm through-holes must penetrate completely through both the bosses and the floor (from Z=0 to Z=30).
